prose:
Frontier-orbital energies of aniline were computed with chemkit’s frontier-orbits skill using DFT at tier “standard” (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted) in PySCF, on the fixed input geometry /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz (single-point DFT//input geometry). Gas phase; charge 0, multiplicity 1. The SCF converged in 9 cycles. No warnings were reported by the engine.  

Headline result (HOMO–LUMO gap): 5.3048177 eV.

Other key values:
• HOMO energy = −5.553772 eV
• LUMO energy = −0.2489544 eV
• Koopmans IP = 5.553772 eV, EA = 0.2489544 eV

integrity.trustworthy = true.

Live PySCF log was streamed to the automatically generated frontier_…out file; full JSON result is in …/tmpai3c_0lj/live.json. Both files can be provided on request.
